name: Compute Management
description: Our flows give you the ability to rest assured that mundane computer management tasks will be taken care of! Explore this section to discover our top selection.

entries.name: AWS EC2 Instance IP and Tag Map
entries.path: AWS EC2 Instance IP and Tag Map.zip
entries.description: Returns an object with one property per instance in a given region, including the tags and private IP address. Requires an AWS authKey and the region to query

entries.name: AWS Launch Ubuntu VM In Any Account
entries.path: AWS Launch Ubuntu VM In Any Account.zip
entries.description:
Build an EC2 instance in AWS using the given AWS auth for a managed SubAccount using the default VPC and network
Automatically finds the latest public Ubuntu AMI image ID
Security groups are created if not already existing
Adds an SSH authKey for the created instance to a Pliant instance
Adds a Route53 DNS record if requested

entries.name: Copy_File_To_VMware_VM_via_VMTools
entries.description:
Copies file data to a given VM using the provided vCenter and VM credentials
Requires the MOID of the target VM, target file path w/ filename and contents
Returns all the output from the procedure

entries.name: Get Zone Data as CSV
entries.description: Returns Infoblox zone data as a CSV. Uses pagination and takes as input the initial page number as well as the number of desired entries per page

entries.name: Map Resources
entries.description: Flow connects to a vCenter running version 6.7. Maps hosts, clusters, datastores, and such. Returns objects the correlate where the resources are related.

entries.name: Patch Alpine
entries.description:
Requires an SSH authKey to an Alpine Linux instance as a user with sudo/nopassword ability for apk commands
Runs an apk update and checks the needed patches on an Alpine instance using a simulated upgrade
Installs patches and confirms that no further patches are needed if "Install_Patches" is true
Optionally reboots the instance and waits for it to be available again
Returns information about patches needed, installed, and still needed

entries.name: Patch Ubuntu
entries.description:
Requires an SSH authKey to an Ubuntu instance as a user with sudo/nopassword ability for apt commands
Runs an apt update and checks the needed patches on an Ubuntu instance
Installs patches and confirms that no further patches are needed if "Install_Patches" is true
Optionally will clena up unneeded packages if "Autoremove" is true
Returns information about patches needed, installed, and still needed

entries.name: Wait for Linux box to be reachable via ssh
entries.path: Wait for Linux box to be reachable via ssh.zip
entries.description:
Attempts to connect to a Linux host via SSH until it works or the timeout is reached. 
Can throw an error on timeout or just exit. 
Result is true if the host became reachable again or false if not.
